name: Egg Drop Problem
description: Find the minimum number of trials needed to determine the critical floor in the worst case with k eggs and n floors.
intuition: dp[k][t] = maximum floors we can check with k eggs and t trials. With k eggs and t trials, we can check dp[k-1][t-1] floors below (if egg breaks) and dp[k][t-1] floors above (if egg survives), plus 1 for the current floor.
